title: api.gouv.fr integration
summary: Register api.gouv.fr APIs as discoverable and consumable API assets in Onyxia.

security.auth: Depends on selected API; public/API-key/OAuth variants expected
security.notes: Each API must record scopes, rate limits, owner, and sample calls.

runtimeHooks.target: First api.gouv.fr endpoint to be selected

checklists: Inject config into an Onyxia service
blockers: User decision needed for first API target.

notes: Should share schema and governance with internal API catalog rather than remain a one-off connector.
